branches.name: Guild Bargain
branches.if_condition: the protagonist cuts Maelin Voss into the investigation instead of exposing him publicly
branches.then_outcome: the guild opens smugglers' routes and hidden ledgers but starts shaping which names can be safely revealed
later_act_consequences: The guild can evacuate civilians before the finale
Maelin may erase evidence tying himself to the deaths

branches.name: Church Custody
branches.if_condition: the protagonist hands the satchel to Sister Orsa
branches.then_outcome: the Sun Choir grants manpower and legitimacy but narrows the acceptable targets of blame
later_act_consequences: The Church can secure the bridge and waystation
Archivist Serel may flee rather than testify

branches.name: Witness Lost
branches.if_condition: Dren Halvek dies before naming his buyers
branches.then_outcome: the investigation must pivot to route permits and hidden shrine records instead of a living witness
later_act_consequences: Act 2 becomes slower and more dangerous
Maelin gains time to prepare a false account

branches.name: Ritual Missed
branches.if_condition: the protagonist reaches the watchtower after the midnight rite has already begun
branches.then_outcome: the ruin answers more violently and some civilians become collateral to the opening
later_act_consequences: The finale starts in chaos rather than secrecy
Sister Orsa is more willing to choose fire over mercy
